title: [Brayern Isle, Jungle Path]
description: Running alongside the volcanic mountain is a dense, canopy-covered path.  The adjacent vines and plants periodically tremble with creatures passing through but otherwise unseen, and the nearby warbling of birds and scrambling of small animals is ever-present.  Thick vines reach down from above and encroach from the sides, as if they were trying to grab at passersby.  The trail slopes at a severe angle; the path north leads up the mountain and the way south heads back toward the beach.
